achievements.title: In-Training Steps

achievements.description: Get every mega digimon's main entry in the digipedia

achievements.description: Purchase every cage

achievements.description: Upgrade 10 different cages

achievements.description: Upgrade every cage to it's maximum

achievements.title: Globe Trotter

achievements.title: Rare Hunter
achievements.description: Successfully hunt a natural Petitmon
achievements.author: TurnipStar

achievements.title: Attentive Tamer
achievements.description: Be a good tamer and pet one of your digimon

achievements.title: Neglectful Tamer
achievements.description: Digivolve a digimon using penalties
achievements.author: TurnipStar

achievements.title: The March of Progress
achievements.description: Digivolve a digimon into a digimon that requires an egg revert
achievements.author: TurnipStar

achievements.title: Back to the Wilds
achievements.description: Release a digimon and later re-hunt it in the wild
achievements.author: TurnipStar

achievements.title: Nothing Beats a Classic!
achievements.description: Beat the title match Origin Survivor using a digimon from the original version 1 v-pet
achievements.author: TurnipStar

achievements.title: I Am the Forest and the Trees
achievements.description: Beat the title match Seas of Emeralds with three different Vegetation digimon
achievements.author: TurnipStar

achievements.title: Pendulum Favouritism
achievements.description: Beat the title match Pendulum Distortion with three different digimon from the same pendulum v-pet series
achievements.author: TurnipStar

achievements.title: Out Mamemon the Mamemon
achievements.description: Beat the title match Mame World with all three types of Mamemon
achievements.author: TurnipStar

achievements.title: A Worthy Opponent
achievements.description: Win a 10 star 1v1 free battle
achievements.author: TurnipStar

achievements.title: Hunting Expert
achievements.description: Hunt an in-training II digimon using only the starting rope, excluding Nyaromon
achievements.author: TurnipStar

achievements.title: Tricky Hunter
achievements.description: Hunt an ultimate digimon without using a rope
achievements.author: TurnipStar

achievements.title: Min-Maxing
achievements.description: Train a champion level digimon or higher to max 5 out of its 6 main stats
achievements.author: TurnipStar

achievements.title: A Hop, Skip, and a Jump
achievements.description: Raise a digimon from in-training I to mega in a single day
achievements.author: TurnipStar

achievements.title: The "Ultimate" Tamer
achievements.description: Beat the preliminaries using only ultimate level digimon or lower
achievements.author: TurnipStar

achievements.title: Battles? Who Needs Battles?
achievements.description: Digivolve a Koromon into an Agumon without participating in any battles in a single session
achievements.author: TurnipStar

achievements.title: Was That So Difficult?
achievements.description: Take control of an Imperialdramon or a Gallantmon, and use your superior skills to defeat an opponent
achievements.author: TurnipStar
